title: Decent app
review: The app is otherwise ok and stable. While redeeming the money from MFs the app always has a default option to credit the amount to groww balance instead of bank account. A user has to manually switch to bank account each time if they dont want it to be credited to wallet. Please keep the default option as bank account and not wallet. In emergencies this manual switch is easily skipped and then it takes 1 additional day to transfer money to bank account from wallet which is just inconvenient. Instead the wallet should be optional and default should be bank account for crediting the redeemed balance.

title: Simple & Beginner-Friendly Investing App
review: I’ve been using Groww for stocks and mutual funds, and the experience has been smooth overall. The interface is clean and easy to understand, especially for beginners. Account setup, KYC, and investing are straightforward, and tracking portfolio performance is convenient. What I like most is the simplicity—no unnecessary clutter, and everything from SIPs to IPOs is easily accessible. Transactions are usually fast, and the app runs smoothly. That said, there’s still room for improvement in customer support response time and advanced analytics for serious investors. Overall, a great app for beginners and intermediate users who want a hassle-free investing experience.
